assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create an Imgix account, connect an existing asset store as a Source, deploy an imgix.net subdomain, and open the first source asset in a browser.

first_success.outcome: The browser displays the source asset served at https://your_domain.imgix.net/path-to-your-asset.
first_success.observable_signal: Opening the Imgix URL serves the requested asset in the browser.

route_selection.surface: Imgix Quick Start Guide through serving the first asset
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Dashboard signup then Source create and first asset URL
candidates.reason: Signup application states are opaque; Source type choice depends on an existing external asset store.

required_path.action: Sign up for an Imgix account and reach the dashboard.
Create a Source pointing at an existing asset store.

required_fields.label: Storage connection details for the selected type

required_path.observable_result: A Source is deployed with an Imgix subdomain.

required_path.action: Open a source asset through the Imgix subdomain URL.

required_fields.label: Asset path on the Imgix URL

required_path.observable_result: The browser displays the asset served by Imgix.

prerequisites.description: An existing origin asset store is required for Source creation.

external_gates.description: Origin storage provider credentials or permissions outside Imgix.

platform_outcomes.description: Imgix deploys the Source and serves assets on the subdomain.

excluded.item: Advanced Source settings such as cache TTL and custom domains
excluded.reason: Documented as adjustable after Source deployment, not required for first serve.

uncertainties.question: What exact registration and dashboard-arrival states appear in the Imgix signup application?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account signup walkthrough through first Source creation.

uncertainties.question: Which origin storage type should be the universal first Source?
uncertainties.impact: Changes required connection fields and external gates.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Explicit selection of one Source type with current required fields documented or observed.
